NA = No inpatient facility admission. CHAR 2 x x x x X X
M2420_DSCHRG_DISP M2420 Discharge Disposition This field indicates where the patient is after discharge from the agency. 01 = Patient remained in the community (without formal assistive services).
02 = Patient remained in the community (with formal assistive services).
03 = Patient transferred to a non-institutional hospice.
04 = Unknown because patient moved to a geographical location not served by this
